content: Anthropic tool use agent loop: model returns stop_reason='tool_use' with tool_use content block (id, name, input). App extracts tool call, executes tool, appends assistant message + user message with tool_result block (tool_use_id matches). Loop repeats while stop_reason=='tool_use', terminates on 'end_turn'. Multiple tool calls can appear in one response; tool_results must precede text in same message. Streaming variant yields tool_use deltas. Python SDK: anthropic.Anthropic().messages.create() with tools=[] parameter.
